hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *routes/api.php|*app/Http/Controllers/Api/*) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"This change touched the API layer. Update API_DOCUMENTATION.md with the new/changed endpoint (method, auth requirement, params, response shape) and regenerate API_DOCUMENTATION.pdf from it before considering this task done."}}' ;; esac; }
